Operation 'Policy_Evaluate' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details. Current description uses vague language ('consults', 'checks') and doesn't clearly explain what is returned or the practical use case. Enhanced description clarifies the matching logic, specifies the return value (list of matching policies), and connects to the domain context of price and promotion policy validation for AI agent understanding.

data.current_description: This endpoint consults all policies and checks the ones that satisfy the request body's conditions.
data.description_suggestion: Evaluates all policies against provided conditions to identify which policies match the specified criteria. Accepts policy conditions in the request body and returns a list of policies that satisfy those conditions. This operation is useful for determining which price and promotion policies apply to a given scenario.
data.reasoning: Current description uses vague language ('consults', 'checks') and doesn't clearly explain what is returned or the practical use case. Enhanced description clarifies the matching logic, specifies the return value (list of matching policies), and connects to the domain context of price and promotion policy validation for AI agent understanding.

message: Operation 'Policy_CreateOrUpdate' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details. Current summary only mentions 'Create' but the operation actually creates or updates (as indicated by the License Manager resource and operation ID). Current description is too minimal and doesn't explain the upsert behavior or what the request body should contain. Enhanced version clarifies the create-or-update semantics, explains input requirements, specifies the return value, and helps AI agents understand when to use this operation versus the PUT update operation.

data.current_description: Creates a new policy from scratch.
data.summary_suggestion: Create or update policy by ID
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new policy or updates an existing policy identified by the provided ID. Accepts policy configuration including conditions and actions in the request body. Returns the created or updated policy object. If the policy ID does not exist, a new policy is created; if it exists, the existing policy is replaced with the new configuration.
data.reasoning: Current summary only mentions 'Create' but the operation actually creates or updates (as indicated by the License Manager resource and operation ID). Current description is too minimal and doesn't explain the upsert behavior or what the request body should contain. Enhanced version clarifies the create-or-update semantics, explains input requirements, specifies the return value, and helps AI agents understand when to use this operation versus the PUT update operation.

data.current_description: Updates an existing policy at your account.
data.description_suggestion: Updates an existing policy identified by the provided ID with new configuration. Accepts policy updates including conditions and actions in the request body. Returns the updated policy object. The policy must exist before updating; use the Create operation if the policy does not exist.
